name: Dutch Dandruff
recipeInstructions:
With an adult's help, preheat oven to the temperature on the package.
Grease the inside of both cake pans with vegetable shortening, then lightly dust with flour. Prepare and bake the cake according to package directions. After removing the cake from the pans, allow it to cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes.
Place one layer upside down on a cake plate. Spread a thin layer of frosting on top only, then carefully place the second layer on top of the first layer.
Fill the ziploc bag with the remaining frosting and twist the top tightly shut.
Using scissors, cut off a tiny bottom corner of the bag.
To decorate:
Imagine the top of the cake as the top of a human head. Using the plastic bag of icing as a pastry bag, squeeze a stream of frosting falling from the imaginary hair down one side of the cake.
Using a dab of frosting, glue two cherries on the cake's face for eyes and one for a nose.
Using clean scissors, carefully cut a piece of fruit roll-up into the shape of a tongue. Fold the tongue in half lengthwise to form a realistic crease down the middle.
For an extra creepy touch, place a sterilized comb or afro pick on the side of the cake's head.
